description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events, excluding documentation and markdown files. The workflow has four jobs: lint, unit-tests, coverage, and automerge. The lint job checks code style on ubuntu-latest with Node.js 14.x, while the unit-tests job runs tests on multiple Node.js versions and operating systems. The coverage job aggregates test coverage and the automerge job merges Dependabot pull requests.
